name: Potato Salad with Italian Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 large Clove garlic, peeled and forced through a press
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
- Prepare the Dressing: Combine about 1 tablespoon of water with the cornstarch to dissolve. In a saucepan, combine the remaining water, cornstarch mixture, vinegar, and tomato paste. Bring to a boil and continue boiling until slightly thickened. Remove from heat and whisk in garlic, mustard, basil, oregano, cayenne, salt, and pepper. Whisk in olive oil. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
- Prepare the Salad: Scrub potatoes (do not peel) and cut into halves. Steam over boiling water until tender (about 20-25 minutes), then drain and transfer to a bowl. Add 4 tablespoons of dressing and shallot. Refrigerate for several hours.
- Cook Green Beans: Bring water to boil, add beans, and cook about 5 minutes or until tender. Drain and plunge into ice water. Pat dry and add to the potatoes.
- Assemble Salad: Stir in olives, tomatoes, and basil leaves. Add dressing as needed to coat. If making ahead, refrigerate; remove from refrigerator about 1 hour before serving.
